faqs.question: What qualifies as a pest control emergency in Woodlawn?
faqs.answer: A pest emergency includes severe infestations like multiple rodents, widespread bed bugs, large wasp nests, or any pest situation posing immediate health or safety risks. If you're seeing pests during daytime hours, finding droppings throughout your home, or experiencing bites, you need emergency service. We respond quickly to all urgent situations in Woodlawn.
